summary: iOS companion app for c9s — Tervezo AI implementation management

1_scaffolding_api.description: Swift Package with iOS 18+ target, OpenAPI spec, KeychainService, TervezoService (19 API operations), and unit tests

2_swiftdata_cache.description: SwiftData models (CachedImplementation, CachedWorkspace, CachedTimelineMessage, AppSettings), CacheService with sync/upsert, and tests

3_onboarding_settings.description: OnboardingView with API key validation, SettingsView with key management and base URL, app launch flow with auth routing

4_implementation_list.description: ImplementationListVM with filtering/sorting/polling/search, StatusBadge, CostLabel, RelativeTimeLabel, ImplementationRowView, and full list view

5_implementation_detail.description: ImplementationDetailVM with parallel loading and tab management, all subviews (StepProgress, Timeline, Plan, Diff, Changes, TestOutput, Markdown, Loading)

6_sse_streaming.description: SSEStreamService with native URLSession bytes API, auto-reconnect with exponential backoff (1s-30s), cursor-based reconnection

7_interactive_actions.description: Prompt input with conflict handling, PR lifecycle (create/merge/close/reopen), restart, SSH access — all in detail view action menu

8_create_implementation.description: CreateImplementationVM with workspace loading, form validation, mode picker. CreateImplementationView with prompt editor. Navigation wiring and 20 tests

9_ssh_terminal.description: SSHService, TerminalVM, SandboxTerminalView with SSH info, copy command, browser access. SwiftTerminalView UIViewRepresentable wrapper. 8 tests

10_push_notifications.description: NotificationService with APNs, 4 categories, interactive actions. DeepLinkRouter for URL scheme and notification navigation. AppDelegate wiring

11_polish.description: HapticFeedback utility, VoiceOver accessibility labels, deep link navigation integration, haptic feedback on key actions

12_testing_ci.description: GitHub Actions CI workflow template (macOS 15/Xcode 16), SwiftLint configuration with safety rules

13_documentation.description: README with architecture overview, feature list, testing instructions, CI setup, and dependency documentation

technicalDecisions: Used direct URLSession + JSONSerialization instead of generated OpenAPI client for flexibility
Used native URLSession bytes API for SSE instead of EventSource library dependency
Implemented cursor-based SSE reconnection matching Rust TUI logic
SwiftTerm wrapper ready for SSH library integration (iOS can't spawn shell processes)
CI workflow stored as template due to GitHub App workflow permission restrictions
